description: Designed for businesses promoting their services around Earth Day, this email template provides a dynamic and engaging way to connect with customers. The layout is ideal for business newsletters, offering a sleek, dark mode design that reduces screen glare and saves energy, in line with the theme of environmental consciousness. With its Earth Day focus, this template allows businesses to showcase their commitment to sustainability and environmental responsibility. Whether you're promoting eco-friendly initiatives, services or sharing company updates, this email template is designed to captivate your audience in an aesthetically pleasing and environmentally conscious way. Its unique design and functionality make it perfect for businesses aiming to make a positive impact on the planet.
short_description: Promote your business services this Earth Day with our dynamic, dark mode email template designed for engaging newsletters. Showcase your commitment to sustainability and captivate your audience with its eco-friendly design. Ideal for businesses making a positive planetary impact.

designer.description: I am Héctor "Titus" Ruiz, a Peruvian designer based in the Canary Islands. I'm focused on Brand Identity Design and UI Design. I help companies build brands, discovering their true potential through a research-based design process, creating an impactful identity.
